findings.title: Secret-scan red evidence does not record a failing command exit
findings.description: SEC-1 is a blocking gate and requires a genuine red-before-green pair. This red artifact includes Bun assertion-failure output, but the durable log concludes with EXIT:0, so the archived command record does not demonstrate a failing red run in a machine-checkable way. Regenerate the red evidence without swallowing the failing command status, or explicitly capture the tested command and its nonzero exit.
